description: Use this API to purge (re-initialize) an individual OPF bus load data record from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_load_indv(eibus, loadid)

parameters.name: loadid
parameters.description: Bus load identifier. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
